summary: Tested AEC HR SuperApp Prompt 3 (Attendance) + Prompt 4 (Payroll). All backend pytest cases (17/17), Django shell unit checks (PT slabs, generate_for_profile, Cinema skip-late), and HTTP integration flows (login, generate, approve, finalize, slip PDF, incentive add) PASS. Frontend Playwright check confirms login, dashboard tiles, payroll page, tax page, attendance clock + dashboard all render with all required data-testid attributes.

issues: Tailwind is loaded via cdn.tailwindcss.com (prints a console warning in browser). Should be replaced with PostCSS or CLI build for production. Functional but cosmetic warning.

action_items: Optional: replace cdn.tailwindcss.com script with compiled Tailwind CSS to silence production warning.
critical_code_review_comments: PayrollService.kerala_pt_for_basic logic is correct: 30000*6=180000 maps to last slab (1250) for Aug/Feb, 0 for other months. Verified.
Cinema skip-late correctly checks profile.department.is_cinema in attendance/signals._process_late_check. Verified end-to-end with seeded CIN attendance row at 10:30 IST → is_late=False.
MDOnlyMixin uses UserPassesTestMixin which raises PermissionDenied (403) for non-MD users — HR correctly blocked from /payroll/incentive/add/.
Payroll generate transitions DRAFT → HEAD_REVIEW; idempotent (won't touch is_locked rows). Approve/finalize flow updates status and finalized_at correctly.
Slip PDF builds a valid PDF (>2.9KB, %PDF magic bytes present). Staff branch correctly forbids download until HR_APPROVED/FINALIZED via 403.

All required data-testid attributes present: login-submit, generate-submit, generate-form, payroll-table, history-chart, heatmap-card, incentives-editor, incentive-add-btn, tax-link, card-clock, card-payroll, logout-btn.
Leaflet map + webcam (video/canvas) elements present on /attendance/clock/. Heatmap canvas + leaflet on /attendance/dashboard/.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 22 Attendance rows for HR in Aug 2026 (10h shifts) + 1 CIN attendance row to validate skip-late + 1 Aug 2026 incentive (BONUS 500) for HR via /payroll/incentive/add/. Payroll pk=5 (HR Aug 2026) was approved then finalized (is_locked=True).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/. Run with: cd /app && /root/.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/test_aec_hr_superapp.py -v. Approve/finalize flow is a standalone script (not pytest) at /app/backend/tests/test_approve_finalize_flow.py — note it finalizes HR Aug-2026 payroll (pk=5) which becomes is_locked. Re-running it is safe because subsequent approve attempts return early with 'already finalized' warning; you may need a fresh DB or different month for full re-run. PT spec assertion (₹30k basic in Aug → PT=₹1250) verified via shell.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Both Prompt 3 (Attendance) and Prompt 4 (Payroll) are complete and meet all spec assertions including Cinema skip-late and Kerala PT half-yearly slabs.
